chain.thought: Explanation: A draw has a goal difference of 0, while a decisive win requires a positive margin (typically 2+). No match can be both; none in the table meet both conditions, so no goal difference applies.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
The question imposes contradictory conditions: the match must be both a draw (equal goals, e.g., 1–1, 0–0, 2–2) and a decisive win (one team wins) at the same time on a given date. From the table, draws occur on 17 Sep 2005 (1–1), 1 Oct 2005 (1–1), 26 Dec 2005 (0–0), 12 Feb 2006 (1–1), 1 Apr 2006 (2–2), and 14 Apr 2006 (0–0), while wins occur on different dates (e.g., 25 Sep 2005, 21 Jan 2006, 4 May 2006). No single match can satisfy both conditions simultaneously, so the requested goal difference is not applicable. Therefore, answering “n/a” is appropriate.
